prompt: Create a children’s AI brand mascot using the first image’s friendly white-and-pink robot character, and design the brand name 'SmartBuddy' in the bold yellow cartoon font from the second image.
prompt_refined: Generate a children's AI brand graphic featuring a mascot and text. The mascot should be the friendly, waving white-and-pink robot character from image 1. The brand name 'SmartBuddy' should be prominently displayed alongside or directly below the robot, rendered in the bold yellow cartoon font style from image 2, including its characteristic orange/pink inner shadow and blue outline.
objects: 'SmartBuddy' text in bold yellow cartoon font style
Robot positioned alongside or directly above the 'SmartBuddy' text
'SmartBuddy' text positioned alongside or directly below the robot
